title: React Frontend Engineering
subtitle: Modern React: hooks, state, performance, and the patterns that scale.
summary: React in 2026 looks very different from the class-component era. Hooks, concurrent rendering, server components, and a mature ecosystem of state management changed how serious frontend gets built. This course covers modern React fundamentals: how rendering really works, hooks done right, state management patterns, performance optimization, and the testing and architecture practices that keep large React apps maintainable.
